#!/usr/bin/env bash set -e if [[ "$TRAVIS_BRANCH" == "master" && "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" == "false" && $TRAVIS_JOB_NUMBER =~ ".3" ]]; then git diff --name-only $TRAVIS_COMMIT_RANGE | grep -qE '\.md$|^LICENSE$|travis-gh-pages$' && { rm -rf ../gh-pages git clone -b gh-pages --single-branch https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/ajv-validator/ajv.git ../gh-pages mkdir -p ../gh-pages/_source cp *.md ../gh-pages/_source cp LICENSE ../gh-pages/_source currentDir=$(pwd) cd ../gh-pages $currentDir/node_modules/.bin/gh-pages-generator # remove logo from README sed -i -E "s/<img[^>]+ajv_logo[^>]+>//" index.md git config user.email "$GIT_USER_EMAIL" git config user.name "$GIT_USER_NAME" git add . git commit -am "updated by travis build #$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER" git push --quiet origin gh-pages > /dev/null 2>&1 } fi
